diagram_title: Continuous Orchestration Control Surface — C4 Component Diagram

systems.name: OpenCode Session Runtime
systems.description: Parent-session orchestration runtime with background subagent execution

systems.name: Operator
systems.description: Human user interacting through Web or TUI session surfaces

containers.name: Backend Session Runtime
containers.description: Task dispatch, child lifecycle, stop semantics, and continuation authority

containers.name: Web Session UI
containers.description: Web session page and synced control surfaces

containers.name: TUI Session UI
containers.description: Terminal session UI with session-tree navigation

components.name: Task Dispatch Controller
components.description: Creates child sessions, preserves single-active-child invariant, and stores parent-child linkage

components.name: Task Worker Continuation Subscriber
components.description: Consumes child completion/failure events and resumes the parent orchestrator

components.name: Session Prompt Loop
components.description: Owns foreground streaming state and stop behavior for the parent orchestrator session

components.name: Web Session Surface
components.description: Renders transcript, stop control, and bottom-pinned subagent status bar with child-session route entry

components.name: TUI Session Sync Surface
components.description: Tracks active child state, renders TUI status surface, and jumps via the session tree

relationships.description: Uses Web stop control and active-subagent status surface
Uses TUI stop control, status surface, and session-tree jump
Registers active child linkage against the parent session prompt loop
Injects synthetic continuation and clears authoritative child state on completion/failure
Publishes foreground-stop state and active-child status to Web sync/UI
Publishes foreground-stop state and active-child status to TUI sync/UI
